# Verbeek.ug Real Estates

> Verbeek.ug Real Estates is Uganda's property listings platform — find apartments, houses, land and commercial properties for rent and sale across all districts of Uganda.

## What Verbeek.ug Real Estates does

- Searchable property listings for rent and sale across Uganda
- Property details including bedrooms, bathrooms, price in UGX, photos and map location
- District- and city-level filtering across all Ugandan regions
- Direct contact with property owners and agents

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://real-estates.verbeek.ug/): Map-based property search and discovery
- [All Properties](https://real-estates.verbeek.ug/properties): Full property search with filters by district, city, type and price
- [Sitemap](https://real-estates.verbeek.ug/sitemap.xml): Index of all published property listings

## Content notes

Property listings include: title, full description, listing type (rent or sale), property type (apartment, house, land, commercial, etc.), number of bedrooms and bathrooms, price in Ugandan Shillings (UGX), and a precise location (district, city, street address, latitude/longitude) within Uganda (country code: UG).

Prices are quoted in UGX (Ugandan Shilling) unless otherwise stated.

## About

Verbeek.ug Real Estates connects property seekers with property owners and agents in Uganda. The platform is focused exclusively on properties located in Uganda.

## Optional

- [Sitemap XML](https://verbeek-ug-real-estates.com/sitemap.xml)
